meta.title: Run Faster
meta.description: Advanced character options for Shadowrun 5th Edition, including new metatypes, qualities, creation methods, lifestyles, contacts, and more.

metatypes.name: Gnome
metatypes.description: Small, magically resistant dwarves known for their youthful appearance and arcane nullifying abilities.

metatypes.name: Hanuman
metatypes.description: Simian dwarves from the Indian subcontinent with prehensile tails and monkey-like features.

metatypes.name: Koborokuru
metatypes.description: Japanese dwarves known for their speed and unusual body hair patterns.

metatypes.name: Menehune
metatypes.description: Hawaiian dwarves adapted to aquatic environments with exceptional swimming abilities.

metatypes.name: Dryad
metatypes.description: Elf variants with an innate connection to nature, possessing glamour and symbiotic plant bonds.

metatypes.name: Nocturna
metatypes.description: Nocturnal elves covered in colored fur, with enhanced hearing and aversion to sunlight.

metatypes.name: Wakyambi
metatypes.description: Exceptionally tall, slender African elves known for their elongated limbs and speed.

metatypes.name: Xapiri Thëpë
metatypes.description: Amazonian elves who photosynthesize, sensitive to pollutants but deeply connected to nature.

metatypes.name: Nartaki
metatypes.description: Multi-armed humans from South Asia, possessing an extra pair of arms and striking skin coloring.

metatypes.name: Hobgoblin
metatypes.description: European ork variants with pronounced fangs, vivid eyes, and a vindictive temperament.

metatypes.name: Ogre
metatypes.description: Massive ork variants with iron stomachs and exceptional physical strength.

metatypes.name: Oni
metatypes.description: Japanese ork variants with striking skin pigmentation and balanced physical attributes.

metatypes.name: Satyr
metatypes.description: Goat-legged ork variants known for their agility and social charm.

metatypes.name: Cyclopean
metatypes.description: One-eyed troll variants with massive frames and extraordinary strength.

metatypes.name: Fomorian
metatypes.description: Celtic troll variants with arcane resistance and formidable physical power.

metatypes.name: Giant
metatypes.description: Bark-skinned troll variants of enormous size with natural dermal armor.

metatypes.name: Minotaur
metatypes.description: Bull-horned troll variants with devastating gore attacks and immense body mass.

metatypes.name: Centaur
metatypes.description: Four-legged metasapients with innate magical abilities, combining equine and humanoid forms.

metatypes.name: Naga
metatypes.description: Serpentine metasapients with natural armor, venom, and dual-natured perception.

metatypes.name: Pixie
metatypes.description: Tiny winged metasapients with natural concealment abilities but limited education.

metatypes.name: Sasquatch
metatypes.description: Massive primate metasapients with mimicry abilities and dual-natured awareness.

metatypes.name: Shapeshifter (Bovine)
metatypes.description: Awakened bovine shapeshifters capable of assuming metahuman form, known for their physical endurance and formidable strength.

metatypes.name: Shapeshifter (Canine)
metatypes.description: Awakened canine shapeshifters with keen senses and pack instincts, equally at home in the wilds or the urban sprawl.

metatypes.name: Shapeshifter (Equine)
metatypes.description: Awakened equine shapeshifters prized for their raw power and speed, often found ranging across the NAN territories.

metatypes.name: Shapeshifter (Falconine)
metatypes.description: Awakened raptor shapeshifters with extraordinary eyesight and devastating aerial strikes, among the rarest of their kind.
racialTraits: Natural Weapon (Bite: DV (STR +2)P, AP -1, Reach -1; Talons: DV (STR)P, AP -)

metatypes.name: Shapeshifter (Leonine)
metatypes.description: Awakened great cat shapeshifters embodying predatory grace and raw power, feared across the African and Asian wilderness.
racialTraits: Natural Weapon (Bite: DV (STR +1)P, AP -1; Claws: DV (STR +1)P, AP -1, +1 Reach)

metatypes.name: Shapeshifter (Lupine)
metatypes.description: Awakened wolf shapeshifters with heightened senses and fierce loyalty, thriving in both wilderness packs and shadowrunner teams.

metatypes.name: Shapeshifter (Pantherine)
metatypes.description: Awakened panther shapeshifters combining stealth and cunning with razor-sharp instincts, favored as infiltrators in the shadows.
racialTraits: Natural Weapon (Bite: DV (STR +2)P, AP -3; Claws: DV (STR +1)P, AP -)

metatypes.name: Shapeshifter (Tigrine)
metatypes.description: Awakened tiger shapeshifters possessing devastating strength and predatory intelligence, among the most dangerous shifters alive.
racialTraits: Natural Weapon (Bite: DV (STR +2)P, AP -2; Claws: DV (STR +1)P, AP -1, +1 Reach)

metatypes.name: Shapeshifter (Ursine)
metatypes.description: Awakened bear shapeshifters of immense physical power and resilience, as comfortable in the frozen barrens as in a brawl.
racialTraits: Natural Weapon (Bite: DV (STR +2)P, AP -2; Claws: DV (STR +3)P, AP -1, +1 Reach)

metatypes.name: Shapeshifter (Vulpine)
metatypes.description: Awakened fox shapeshifters renowned for their cunning and adaptability, often blending seamlessly into metahuman society.

positive.name: Adrenaline Surge
positive.summary: Act first in the first Initiative Pass of combat, before anyone rolls Initiative.

effects.description: Act first in the first Initiative Pass, before Initiative is rolled.

positive.name: Animal Empathy
positive.summary: +2 dice to animal influence/control tests.

effects.description: +2 dice to Animal Handling tests.

positive.name: Black Market Pipeline
positive.summary: 10% price reduction and +2 Availability for one contact or gear category.

positive.name: Born Rich
positive.summary: Trade up to 40 Karma for nuyen at character creation instead of the normal 10.

positive.name: City Slicker
positive.summary: +1 Outdoors in urban environments, -1 Perception/Survival in non-urban.

effects.description: +1 die to Outdoors skill tests in urban environments.
-1 die to Perception and Survival tests outside urban areas.

positive.name: College Education
positive.summary: Half-price Academic Knowledge skills at character creation.

positive.name: Common Sense
positive.summary: GM warns the player when the character is about to do something obviously foolish (once per session via Edge).

positive.name: Daredevil
positive.summary: Regain 2 Edge instead of 1 for daring actions.

positive.name: Digital Doppelganger
positive.summary: +2 threshold for Matrix tracking on your linked SIN.

effects.description: +2 to the threshold for Matrix searches targeting your SIN.

positive.name: Disgraced
positive.summary: +2 Intimidate against criminals; penalty with upright citizens.

effects.description: +2 dice to Intimidation tests against criminals.

positive.name: Erased
positive.summary: No Matrix search results; Public Awareness maximum 1.

effects.description: No Matrix search results exist for this character.
Public Awareness cannot exceed 1.

positive.name: Fame
positive.summary: Character is publicly known; social bonuses scaling with fame level.

1.name: Local Fame
1.description: Well-known in a single neighborhood or small community.

2.name: Regional Fame
2.description: Known throughout a city or sprawl.

3.name: National Fame
3.description: Famous across a country or major region.

positive.name: Friends in High Places
positive.summary: Extra CHA x 4 Karma for contacts with Connection 8+.

positive.name: Hawk Eye
positive.summary: +1 Perception; range modifiers shift up one category.

effects.description: +1 die to visual Perception tests.

positive.name: Inspired
positive.summary: +2 Street Cred among artists; +1 Artisan or Performance.

effects.description: +1 die to Artisan or Performance tests.

positive.name: Jack of All Trades
positive.summary: -1 Karma cost for skills up to rating 5; +2 Karma cost beyond rating 5.

positive.name: Lightning Reflexes
positive.summary: +1 Initiative rating, +1 Initiative die, +1 Defense (unaugmented only).

prerequisite.description: Cannot have any Reaction or Initiative augmentations (cyberware, bioware, adept powers, etc.)

effects.description: +1 to Reaction attribute.
+1d6 to Initiative.

positive.name: Linguist
positive.summary: Half language learning time; 2-for-1 language skills at character creation.

positive.name: Made Man
positive.summary: Free syndicate group contact; fence services at 30%.

positive.name: Night Vision
positive.summary: Low-light vision with sun glare penalty.

effects.description: Natural low-light vision; no penalties in dim light conditions.
-1 die penalty in bright sunlight or glare conditions.

positive.name: Outdoorsman
positive.summary: +2 Outdoors in rural environments; -1 Perception/Survival in urban.

effects.description: +2 dice to Outdoors skill tests in rural/wilderness environments.
-1 die to Perception and Survival tests in urban areas.

positive.name: Overclocker
positive.summary: +1 Rating to one cyberdeck ASDF attribute.

effects.description: +1 to the chosen cyberdeck ASDF attribute rating.

positive.name: Perceptive
positive.summary: +1/+2 dice to all Perception tests.

effects.description: +1 die per rating to Perception tests.

positive.name: Perfect Time
positive.summary: Always knows the exact time; +1 Free Action per Initiative Pass.

effects.description: +1 Free Action per Initiative Pass.

positive.name: Poor Link
positive.summary: -2 Ritual Spellcasting against this character; +2 dice to resist ritual spells.

effects.description: +2 dice to resist ritual spells targeting this character.

positive.name: Privileged Family Name
positive.summary: Minor misdemeanor immunity in home sprawl due to family connections.

positive.name: Restricted Gear
positive.summary: Buy one item up to Availability 24 at character creation.

positive.name: School of Hard Knocks
positive.summary: Half-price Street Knowledge skills at character creation.

positive.name: Sense of Direction
positive.summary: Always knows which way is north; +1 die to Navigation tests.

effects.description: +1 die to Navigation tests.

positive.name: Sensei
positive.summary: Free training contact for one skill.

positive.name: Solid/Legendary Rep
positive.summary: +1/+2 Reputation with a specific group.

positive.name: Speed Reading
positive.summary: Read approximately 800 words per 5 seconds.

positive.name: Spike Resistance
positive.summary: +1 die per level to resist biofeedback damage.

effects.description: +1 die per rating to resist biofeedback damage.

positive.name: Spirit Whisperer
positive.summary: Summoned spirits arrive at Force+1.

effects.description: Summoned spirits of the chosen type arrive at Force + 1.

positive.name: Steely Eyed Wheelman
positive.summary: Terrain modifiers reduced by 1 for vehicle tests.

effects.description: Reduce terrain modifiers by 1 for vehicle tests.

positive.name: Technical School Education
positive.summary: Half-price Professional Knowledge skills at character creation.

positive.name: Tough as Nails
positive.summary: +1 box per rating to Physical or Stun Condition Monitor (max 3 per monitor).

effects.description: +1 box per rating to the chosen Condition Monitor (Physical or Stun).

positive.name: Trust Fund
positive.summary: Free lifestyle and monthly nuyen based on level.

positive.name: Trustworthy
positive.summary: +1 Influence; +2 Social Limit for establishing trust.

effects.description: +1 die to Influence skill group tests.
+2 Social Limit when establishing trust.

positive.name: Vehicle Empathy
positive.summary: +1 Pilot tests; +1 Handling (not jumped in).

effects.description: +1 die to all Vehicle tests.

positive.name: Water Sprite
positive.summary: +2 dice to Diving and Swimming tests.

effects.description: +2 dice to Diving and Swimming tests.

positive.name: Witness My Hate
positive.summary: +2 DV on Direct Damage spells; +2 Drain on those spells.

effects.description: +2 DV to Direct Damage combat spells.
+2 Drain when casting Direct Damage combat spells.

positive.name: SURGE (Class I)
positive.summary: Sudden Recessive Genetic Expression Class I; all metagenic qualities are randomly determined.

positive.name: SURGE (Class II)
positive.summary: Sudden Recessive Genetic Expression Class II; player chooses positive metagenic qualities, negatives are random.

positive.name: SURGE (Class III)
positive.summary: Sudden Recessive Genetic Expression Class III; player freely chooses all metagenic qualities with a coherent theme.

positive.name: 360-Degree Eyesight
positive.summary: Can see in all directions simultaneously, eliminating surprise from behind and flanking bonuses.

positive.name: Biosonar
positive.summary: Echolocation ability allows perception of surroundings without sight, functioning like ultrasound sensor.

positive.name: Broadened Auditory Spectrum
positive.summary: Hear infrasonic and ultrasonic frequencies beyond normal metahuman range.

positive.name: Electroception

1.name: Basic
1.description: Detect electrical fields within close range.

2.name: Enhanced
2.description: Detect and interpret electrical fields at extended range, including bioelectric signatures.

positive.summary: Sense electrical fields generated by living beings and electronics.

positive.name: Keen-Eared (Metagenic)
positive.summary: Exceptionally sharp hearing grants +1 die to audio-based Perception Tests.

positive.name: Low-Light Vision (Metagenic)

1.name: Basic
1.description: See normally in dim light conditions.

2.name: Enhanced
2.description: See clearly in near-total darkness with minimal light.

positive.summary: See normally in low-light conditions; metagenic mutation grants this to metatypes that lack it naturally.

positive.name: Magic Sense
positive.summary: Innately perceive magical auras and active spells without using Assensing or being Awakened.

positive.name: Magnetoception
positive.summary: Sense magnetic fields for innate directional awareness, functioning as a natural compass.

positive.name: Thermal Sensitivity
positive.summary: Detect heat signatures through specialized pit organs, similar to thermographic vision but touch-range.

positive.name: Thermographic Vision (Metagenic)
positive.summary: See heat signatures; metagenic mutation grants thermographic vision to metatypes that lack it.

positive.name: Underwater Vision
positive.summary: See clearly underwater without penalty, negating normal visibility modifiers for submerged environments.

positive.name: Vomeronasal Organ
positive.summary: Detect pheromones and chemical signals, granting +2 dice to scent-based Perception Tests and emotional reads.

positive.name: Animal Pelage

1.name: Fur
1.description: Body covered in animal fur; +1 armor vs. Cold damage.

2.name: Feathers
2.description: Body covered in feathers; +1 armor vs. Cold damage, minor gliding ability.

3.name: Scales
3.description: Body covered in reptilian scales; +1 natural armor.

positive.summary: Body is covered in animal-like fur, feathers, or scales providing minor protection.

positive.name: Balance Receptor
positive.summary: Enhanced inner ear grants perfect balance; +2 dice to Balance and Gymnastics Tests to maintain footing.

positive.name: Beak

1.name: Small
1.description: Small beak usable as a natural weapon; (STR)P damage, AP 0.

2.name: Large
2.description: Large crushing beak; (STR+1)P damage, AP -1.

positive.summary: Hardened beak replaces mouth, usable as a natural melee weapon.

positive.name: Bicardiac
positive.summary: Second heart provides redundancy and improved endurance; +1 die to Fatigue Resistance Tests.

positive.name: Bone Spikes
positive.summary: Bony protrusions along body deal (STR)P damage to grapplers and add +1 DV to unarmed attacks.

positive.name: Camouflage

1.name: Basic
1.description: Skin shifts color slowly to match surroundings; +2 dice to Sneaking when stationary.

2.name: Dynamic
2.description: Skin shifts color rapidly; +4 dice to Sneaking, works while moving.

positive.summary: Chromatophore skin cells shift color to blend with surroundings.

positive.name: Celerity
positive.summary: Digitigrade legs increase running speed; multiply Sprint distance by 1.5.

positive.name: Claws

1.name: Nails
1.description: Hardened retractable nails; (STR)P damage, AP 0.

2.name: Claws
2.description: Curved claws; (STR+1)P damage, AP -1.

positive.summary: Hardened retractable claws serve as natural weapons for melee combat.

positive.name: Climate Adaptation
positive.summary: Body is adapted to a specific extreme climate, reducing environmental modifiers in that environment.

positive.name: Elongated Limbs
positive.summary: Arms and/or legs are longer than normal, granting +1 Reach in melee combat.

positive.name: Fangs
positive.summary: Enlarged fangs usable as a natural weapon; (STR+1)P damage in melee, AP 0.

positive.name: Functional Tail

1.name: Balance
1.description: Tail aids balance; +1 die to Gymnastics and Balance Tests.

2.name: Prehensile
2.description: Tail can grip and manipulate objects with AGI-2 effective Agility.

3.name: Thagomizer
3.description: Spiked tail usable as weapon; (STR+2)P damage, AP -1, Reach 1.

4.name: Striker
4.description: Powerful muscular tail; (STR+3)P damage, AP -1, Reach 1, can sweep.

positive.summary: Fully functional tail of varying capability from balance aid to natural weapon.

positive.name: Gills

1.name: Basic
1.description: Breathe underwater for up to 1 hour before needing air.

2.name: Full
2.description: Breathe underwater indefinitely; fully amphibious.

positive.summary: Gill slits along neck or torso allow breathing underwater.

positive.name: Goring Horns
positive.summary: Large horns usable as natural weapons; (STR+1)P damage, AP -1 on charge attacks.

positive.name: Greasy Skin
positive.summary: Skin secretes slippery oil, granting +2 dice to escape grapples and restraints.

positive.name: Larger Tusks
positive.summary: Oversized tusks deal (STR+1)P damage as natural weapons in melee combat.

positive.name: Monkey Paws
positive.summary: Prehensile feet function as additional hands, capable of gripping and manipulating objects.

positive.name: Proboscis
positive.summary: Elongated tubular mouth structure can deliver natural venom or drain essence on contact.

positive.name: Satyr Legs
positive.summary: Digitigrade goat-like legs grant +2 AGI for movement, +1 Reach for kicks, and enhanced jumping.

positive.name: Setae
positive.summary: Microscopic hair-like structures on hands and feet allow climbing sheer surfaces like a gecko.

positive.name: Shiva Arms
positive.summary: Extra pair of fully functional arms; each pair costs 8 karma and provides additional actions.

positive.name: Webbed Digits
positive.summary: Webbing between fingers and toes doubles swimming speed and grants +2 dice to Swimming Tests.

positive.name: Corrosive Spit
positive.summary: Spit caustic acid as a ranged attack; deals (STR)P damage, AP -2, short range.

positive.name: Natural Venom

1.name: Mild Injection
1.description: Injected mild venom; Power 6, Speed 1 Combat Turn.

2.name: Mild Inhalation
2.description: Inhalation mild venom; Power 6, Speed Immediate.

3.name: Mild Contact
3.description: Contact mild venom; Power 6, Speed Immediate.

4.name: Moderate Injection
4.description: Injected moderate venom; Power 9, Speed 1 Combat Turn.

5.name: Moderate Inhalation
5.description: Inhalation moderate venom; Power 9, Speed Immediate.

6.name: Moderate Contact
6.description: Contact moderate venom; Power 9, Speed Immediate.

7.name: Serious Injection
7.description: Injected serious venom; Power 12, Speed 1 Combat Turn.

8.name: Serious Inhalation
8.description: Inhalation serious venom; Power 12, Speed Immediate.

9.name: Serious Contact
9.description: Contact serious venom; Power 12, Speed Immediate.

10.name: Deadly Injection
10.description: Injected deadly venom; Power 15, Speed Immediate.

11.name: Deadly Inhalation
11.description: Inhalation deadly venom; Power 15, Speed Immediate.

12.name: Deadly Contact
12.description: Contact deadly venom; Power 15, Speed Immediate.

positive.summary: Produce natural venom deliverable by bite, spit, or skin contact with varying severity from mild to deadly.

positive.name: Nasty Vibe
positive.summary: Project an unsettling astral aura that causes unease; -2 dice penalty to social tests against the character by mundanes.

positive.name: Arcane Arrester

1.name: Level 1
1.description: +1 die to resist all magical effects.

2.name: Level 2
2.description: +2 dice to resist all magical effects.

3.name: Level 3
3.description: +3 dice to resist all magical effects.

positive.summary: Innate magic resistance grants bonus dice to resist spells, powers, and magical effects per level.

positive.name: Defensive Secretion
positive.summary: Skin secretes a noxious or toxic substance when threatened, deterring melee attackers.

positive.name: Dermal Alteration

1.name: Blubber
1.description: Thick subcutaneous fat layer; +1 armor, +2 Cold resistance.

2.name: Dragon Skin
2.description: Tough scaled hide; +2 natural armor.

3.name: Bark Skin
3.description: Rough bark-like skin; +2 natural armor, -1 Social Tests.

positive.summary: Skin mutates into a toughened protective covering, ranging from blubber to stone-like armor plating.

positive.name: Dermal Deposits
positive.summary: Calcium or calcium-ite deposits beneath the skin provide +1 natural armor.

positive.name: Frog Tongue
positive.summary: Extendable prehensile tongue with 1.5m reach can grab small objects or deliver touch attacks.

positive.name: Glamour
positive.summary: Innate magical aura of beauty and charm; +2 dice to social tests involving persuasion or seduction.

positive.name: Marsupial Pouch
positive.summary: Abdominal pouch capable of carrying small items or objects up to 2 kg concealed on person.

positive.name: Metagenic Attribute Improvement
positive.summary: Permanently increase the maximum for one Physical or Mental attribute by 1 through metagenic mutation.

positive.name: Ogre Stomach
positive.summary: Digest almost any organic material as food; immune to ingested toxins and poisons.

positive.name: Photometabolism
positive.summary: Derive sustenance from sunlight; food requirements halved when exposed to at least 4 hours of light daily.

positive.name: Thorns
positive.summary: Small thorny protrusions deal 1P damage to anyone making unarmed contact or grappling.

positive.name: Infected (HMHVV)
positive.summary: Character is infected with HMHVV, gaining critter powers and suffering weaknesses based on their infected type.

negative.name: Albinism
negative.summary: Increased Glare penalties from lack of pigmentation.

1.name: Partial
1.description: Light skin and hair; increased glare sensitivity.

2.name: Full
2.description: Complete albinism; severe glare penalties and social stigma.

effects.description: Increased glare penalties due to lack of pigmentation.

negative.name: Amnesia
negative.summary: Lost memories; GM controls what is remembered and revealed.

1.name: Partial
1.description: Some memories lost; GM reveals details over time.

2.name: Total
2.description: Complete memory loss; GM controls all backstory reveals.

negative.name: Asthma
negative.summary: Double fatigue frequency; penalties in poor air quality.

effects.description: Fatigue tests occur at double the normal frequency.

negative.name: Bi-polar
negative.summary: Random mood swings affecting attributes; GM rolls each session.

effects.description: GM rolls each session to determine mood state; may gain +1 or -1 to social/mental attributes.

negative.name: Big Regret
negative.summary: -3 Social Limit vs those who know about the regret.

effects.description: -3 Social Limit when dealing with those who know about the regret.

negative.name: Blind
negative.summary: Automatic failure on vision tests; severe combat penalties.

effects.description: Automatic failure on all vision-based Perception tests.
-6 dice to combat-related tests due to blindness.

negative.name: Borrowed Time
negative.summary: Secret death roll each session; terminal condition.

negative.name: Computer Illiterate
negative.summary: -4 dice to all computer and electronics tests.

effects.description: -4 dice to all Computer and Electronics skill tests.

negative.name: Creature of Comfort
negative.summary: Penalties when living below expected lifestyle.

1.name: Middle
1.description: Penalties below Middle lifestyle.

2.name: High
2.description: Penalties below High lifestyle.

negative.name: Day Job
negative.summary: Income but time commitment reduces availability for runs.

1.name: Part-Time
1.description: 10 hours/week.

2.name: Full-Time
2.description: 30 hours/week.

negative.name: Deaf
negative.summary: Automatic failure on audio-based Perception tests.

effects.description: Automatic failure on all hearing-based Perception tests.

negative.name: Did You Just Call Me Dumb?
negative.summary: Social glitches become critical glitches.

negative.name: Dimmer Bulb
negative.summary: -1 per level to Logic or Intuition tests.

effects.description: -1 die per rating to tests using the chosen attribute (Logic or Intuition).

negative.name: Driven
negative.summary: Must pursue obsession; +1 Willpower on leads related to it.

negative.name: Emotional Attachment
negative.summary: Must always use chosen item; penalties when separated.

negative.name: Ex-Con
negative.summary: Police file, criminal SIN, and parole requirements.

negative.name: Flashbacks
negative.summary: Incapacitated on trigger; Composure (5) test to recover.

1.name: Uncommon Trigger
1.description: Rare triggers; Composure (5) to recover.

2.name: Common Trigger
2.description: Frequent triggers; Composure (5) to recover.

negative.name: Hobo with a Shotgun
negative.summary: Refuses to stay above Squatter lifestyle.

negative.name: Hung Out to Dry
negative.summary: All contacts have clammed up; cannot use contacts initially.

negative.name: Illiterate
negative.summary: Cannot read; skill restrictions for text-dependent tasks.

negative.name: In Debt
negative.summary: Owe 5,000 nuyen per Karma point; must repay 150%.

negative.name: Incomplete Deprogramming
negative.summary: Cover identity takes over under stress; Composure (4) test.

negative.name: Infirm
negative.summary: Physical attribute maximums reduced by 1 per rating.

effects.description: Reduce Physical attribute maximums (Body, Agility, Reaction, Strength) by 1 per rating.

negative.name: Liar
negative.summary: -1 Social limit; random lying detection by others.

effects.description: -1 Social Limit.

negative.name: Night Blindness
negative.summary: Light modifiers worse by one category.

effects.description: Light/visibility modifiers shift one category worse.

negative.name: Oblivious
negative.summary: -2 Perception; optional +1 to Perception thresholds against you.

1.name: Moderate
1.description: -2 Perception tests.

2.name: Severe
2.description: -2 Perception and +1 to thresholds against you.

effects.description: -2 dice to all Perception tests.

negative.name: Pacifist
negative.summary: Violence restrictions based on severity.

1.name: Moderate
1.description: Will not kill; non-lethal force only.

2.name: Strict
2.description: Will not use violence at all; must find peaceful solutions.

negative.name: Paranoia
negative.summary: -2 Social with low-Loyalty or unfamiliar contacts.

effects.description: -2 dice to Social tests with low-Loyalty or unfamiliar contacts.

negative.name: Paraplegic
negative.summary: Wheelchair mobility; cannot use legs.

negative.name: Phobia
negative.summary: Irrational fear; variable severity and commonality.

negative.name: Pie Iesu Domine
negative.summary: High Pain Tolerance 1 but start with 1 box of Physical damage.

effects.description: Ignore 1 point of wound modifiers (as High Pain Tolerance 1).
Start each session with 1 box of Physical damage.

negative.name: Poor Self Control
negative.summary: Various compulsions based on type.

1.name: Moderate
1.description: Composure (2) test to resist impulse.

2.name: Severe
2.description: Composure (4) test to resist impulse.

negative.name: Records on File
negative.summary: Corps have biometric data; +1 per rating to trace/identify you.

negative.name: Reduced Sense
negative.summary: -2 dice to Perception tests using the specified sense.

effects.description: -2 dice to Perception tests using the specified sense.

negative.name: Sensory Overload Syndrome
negative.summary: Seizures in high-ARO areas; Composure test to avoid incapacitation.

negative.name: Signature
negative.summary: Must leave calling card at every job; makes identification easier.

negative.name: Vendetta
negative.summary: Blood feud; Composure test to avoid confrontation with target.

negative.name: Wanted
negative.summary: 25,000+ nuyen bounty on your head.

negative.name: Adiposis
negative.summary: Extreme uncontrollable weight gain reduces AGI by 1 and halves movement speed.

negative.name: Astral Hazing

1.name: Minor
1.description: Background count of 1 within 5m radius, disrupting astral perception.

2.name: Major
2.description: Background count of 2 within 10m radius, severely disrupting magic.

negative.summary: Generate a localized background count that disrupts magical activity in the surrounding area.

negative.name: Berserker
negative.summary: Enter uncontrollable frenzy when taking Physical damage; must make Composure (3) Test or attack nearest target.

negative.name: Bioluminescence
negative.summary: Skin glows visibly when experiencing strong emotions, making stealth and social deception difficult.

negative.name: Cephalopod Skull
negative.summary: Soft elongated skull deforms easily; -1 die to resist knockdown and called shots to the head deal +1 DV.

negative.name: Cold-Blooded
negative.summary: Body temperature depends on environment; -1 to all actions in cold conditions, lethargy below 5C.

negative.name: Critter Spook
negative.summary: Animals are instinctively hostile or fearful; -2 dice to Animal Handling Tests, animals may flee or attack.

negative.name: Cyclopean Eye
negative.summary: Single large central eye lacks depth perception; -1 die to ranged attacks and distance estimation.

negative.name: Deformity (Picasso)
negative.summary: Facial features are asymmetric and rearranged; -2 dice to social tests with non-changelings.

negative.name: Deformity (Quasimodo)
negative.summary: Severe skeletal deformity with hunched back; -3 dice to social tests, -1 AGI, halved movement.

negative.name: Feathers (Negative)
negative.summary: Body covered in obvious feathers that cannot be hidden, causing social stigma without protective benefit.

negative.name: Impaired Attribute
negative.summary: Maximum for one attribute is permanently reduced by 1 due to metagenic mutation.

negative.name: Insectoid Features
negative.summary: Compound eyes, mandibles, or chitinous patches give an insect-like appearance; -2 social dice with non-changelings.

negative.name: Mood Hair
negative.summary: Hair changes color based on emotional state, making it impossible to hide feelings; -1 to Con Tests.

negative.name: Neoteny
negative.summary: Retain juvenile physical features permanently; treated as a child socially, -2 to Leadership and Intimidation.

negative.name: Nocturnal
negative.summary: Body is adapted to nighttime activity; -1 to all actions in bright light or during daytime hours.

negative.name: Progeria
negative.summary: Accelerated aging causes premature physical decline; -1 BOD and -1 STR, aged appearance.

negative.name: Scales (Negative)
negative.summary: Obvious reptilian scales cover the body without armor benefit, causing social stigma.

negative.name: Scent Glands
negative.summary: Produce strong uncontrollable musk; -2 dice to social tests in close proximity and easier to track by scent.

negative.name: Slow Healer
negative.summary: Natural healing time is doubled; magical healing effects are reduced by 1 hit.

negative.name: Striking Skin Pigmentation
negative.summary: Skin is an unnatural vivid color (blue, green, red, etc.) impossible to conceal without disguise.

negative.name: Stubby Arms
negative.summary: Arms are disproportionately short; -1 Reach, -2 dice to tasks requiring long arm reach.

negative.name: Symbiosis
negative.summary: Dependent on a specific environmental condition or substance; take 1 box of Stun per day without it.

negative.name: Third Eye
negative.summary: Vestigial third eye on forehead is non-functional but highly visible, causing social stigma.

negative.name: Unusual Hair
negative.summary: Hair is replaced by quills, tentacles, or other non-hair growths that are impossible to disguise.

negative.name: Vestigial Tail
negative.summary: Non-functional tail that gets in the way; -1 die to Gymnastics and must accommodate in clothing and seating.

creationMethods.name: Sum to Ten
creationMethods.description: A flexible variant of the Priority system. Assign priority levels A-E to five categories, where A=4, B=3, C=2, D=1, E=0 points. Levels may be repeated, but the total must equal exactly 10.

steps.title: Spells
steps.description: Select spells if you are a magician or mystic adept.

steps.title: Rituals
steps.description: Learn ritual spellcasting if your magical path includes it.

steps.title: Adept Powers
steps.description: Select adept powers using your Power Points (equal to Magic for Adepts).

steps.title: Build Contacts
steps.description: Build your network of contacts using free Karma based on Charisma.

steps.title: Augmentations
steps.description: Install cyberware and bioware. Essence loss affects Magic rating.

steps.title: Matrix Programs
steps.description: Select Matrix programs for your cyberdeck

steps.title: Spend Karma
steps.description: Spend remaining Karma on spells, complex forms, or stat improvements. Max 7 Karma carryover.

steps.title: Identities & SINs
steps.description: Create identities with SINs (fake or real) and licenses. Each character must have at least one identity.

budgets.label: Contact Karma
budgets.description: Free Karma for contacts = CHA x 3

constraints.description: Priority point values (A=4, B=3, C=2, D=1, E=0) must total exactly 10.
constraints.errorMessage: Priority points must total exactly 10.

constraints.description: Only one attribute can be at natural maximum at creation.
constraints.errorMessage: Only one attribute can be at its natural maximum.

constraints.description: Maximum 25 Karma in Positive Qualities.
constraints.errorMessage: Cannot spend more than 25 Karma on positive qualities.

constraints.description: Maximum 25 Karma from Negative Qualities.
constraints.errorMessage: Cannot gain more than 25 Karma from negative qualities.

constraints.description: Skills capped at 6 at creation (7 with Aptitude).
constraints.errorMessage: Skill rating cannot exceed 6 at creation (7 with Aptitude).

constraints.description: Edge starts at metatype value. Magic/Resonance start at priority value (0 for mundane).
constraints.errorMessage: Special attributes must meet minimum requirements.

constraints.description: Gear availability cannot exceed 12 at creation.
constraints.errorMessage: Cannot purchase gear with availability higher than 12.

constraints.description: Essence cannot drop below 0.
constraints.errorMessage: Essence cannot drop below 0.

creationMethods.name: Point Buy
creationMethods.description: A fully karma-based creation system with 800 Karma. Purchase metatype, attributes, skills, qualities, gear, and more using advancement costs. Offers maximum flexibility at the cost of more time-consuming creation.

steps.title: Select Metatype
steps.description: Choose your metatype. Cost is deducted from your 800 Karma budget.

steps.title: Magic/Resonance
steps.description: Purchase a magical or resonance quality to gain access to Magic or Resonance attributes.

steps.title: Allocate Attributes
steps.description: Raise attributes from metatype minimums using advancement costs (New Rating × 5 Karma).

steps.title: Allocate Skills
steps.description: Purchase skills using advancement costs (New Rating × 2 Karma for active, × 5 for groups, × 1 for knowledge).

steps.title: Select Qualities
steps.description: Purchase positive qualities and take negative qualities (refunds Karma).

steps.title: Spells
steps.description: Select spells if you are a magician or mystic adept (5 Karma each).

steps.title: Rituals
steps.description: Learn ritual spellcasting if your magical path includes it.

steps.title: Adept Powers
steps.description: Select adept powers using your Power Points (equal to Magic for Adepts; Mystic Adepts buy power points at 5 Karma each).

steps.title: Build Contacts
steps.description: Build your network of contacts using Karma (Connection + Loyalty per contact).

steps.title: Augmentations
steps.description: Install cyberware and bioware. Essence loss affects Magic rating. Purchased with nuyen from gear karma.

steps.title: Purchase Gear
steps.description: Purchase gear using nuyen (1 Karma = 2,000¥, max 200 Karma on gear).

steps.title: Matrix Programs
steps.description: Select Matrix programs for your cyberdeck.

steps.title: Identities & SINs
steps.description: Create identities with SINs (fake or real) and licenses.

steps.title: Review & Finalize
steps.description: Review your character. All 800 Karma must be spent — no leftover Karma allowed.

budgets.label: Karma
budgets.description: Starting Karma budget for Point Buy creation

constraints.description: Total Karma spent cannot exceed 800. Gear karma capped at 200.
constraints.errorMessage: Karma budget exceeded (800 Karma total, 200 max on gear).

constraints.description: Only one Physical or Mental attribute can be at natural maximum at creation. Special attributes (Edge, Magic, Resonance) are exempt.
constraints.errorMessage: Only one Physical or Mental attribute can be at its natural maximum.

constraints.description: Maximum 25 Karma in Positive Qualities.
constraints.errorMessage: Cannot spend more than 25 Karma on positive qualities.

constraints.description: Maximum 25 Karma from Negative Qualities.
constraints.errorMessage: Cannot gain more than 25 Karma from negative qualities.

constraints.description: Skills capped at 6 at creation (7 with Aptitude).
constraints.errorMessage: Skill rating cannot exceed 6 at creation (7 with Aptitude).

constraints.description: Gear availability cannot exceed 12 at creation.
constraints.errorMessage: Cannot purchase gear with availability higher than 12.

constraints.description: Essence cannot drop below 0.
constraints.errorMessage: Essence cannot drop below 0.

constraints.description: All Karma must be spent — no leftover Karma allowed.
constraints.errorMessage: Leftover Karma cannot be carried over from Point Buy creation.

creationMethods.name: Life Modules
creationMethods.description: A life-path system where characters progress through nationality, formative years, teen years, further education, and real-life career modules. Each module provides attributes, skills, qualities, and knowledge. Starting budget is 750 Karma.

steps.title: Select Metatype
steps.description: Choose your metatype. Metatype costs Karma from your 750 budget.

steps.title: Magic/Resonance
steps.description: Purchase a magical or resonance quality (same costs as Point Buy: Adept 20K, Magician 30K, etc.).

steps.title: Nationality
steps.description: Select your nationality and regional origin. Provides language skills, regional knowledge, and qualities. (15 Karma)

steps.title: Formative Years
steps.description: Select your childhood upbringing (age to 10). Provides attribute points, skills, and qualities. (40 Karma)

steps.title: Teen Years
steps.description: Select your teenage experience (age to 17). Provides skills, knowledge, and qualities. (50 Karma)

steps.title: Further Education
steps.description: Optionally attend an institution and select a discipline. Costs vary by institution (40-115 Karma).

steps.title: Real Life
steps.description: Select career modules (100 Karma each, 4 years). Multiple allowed but no repeats.

steps.title: Tours of Duty
steps.description: Select military tours of duty (100 Karma each, 5 years). Multiple allowed but no repeats.

steps.title: Allocate Attributes
steps.description: Spend remaining Karma to raise attributes (New Rating × 5 Karma).

steps.title: Allocate Skills
steps.description: Spend remaining Karma on skills. Active skill max 7, knowledge skill max 9.

steps.title: Select Qualities
steps.description: Purchase positive qualities or buy off negative qualities gained from modules.

steps.title: Build Contacts
steps.description: Build contacts using Karma (in addition to any granted by modules).

steps.title: Purchase Gear
steps.description: Purchase gear using nuyen (1 Karma = 2,000¥, max 200 Karma on gear).

steps.title: Review & Finalize
steps.description: Review your character. Remaining Karma can be kept (unlike Point Buy).

budgets.label: Karma
budgets.description: Starting Karma budget for Life Modules creation (Run Faster p. 65)

constraints.description: Total Karma spent on modules and purchases cannot exceed 750.
constraints.errorMessage: Karma budget exceeded (750 Karma total, 200 max on gear).

constraints.description: Active skills capped at 7, knowledge skills capped at 9.
constraints.errorMessage: Skill rating exceeds Life Modules creation cap.

constraints.description: Only one Physical or Mental attribute can be at natural maximum at creation.
constraints.errorMessage: Only one Physical or Mental attribute can be at its natural maximum.

constraints.description: Maximum 25 Karma in Positive Qualities.
constraints.errorMessage: Cannot spend more than 25 Karma on positive qualities.

constraints.description: Maximum 25 Karma from Negative Qualities after all modules.
constraints.errorMessage: Cannot gain more than 25 Karma from negative qualities after all modules.

constraints.description: Gear availability cannot exceed 12 at creation.
constraints.errorMessage: Cannot purchase gear with availability higher than 12.

constraints.description: Essence cannot drop below 0.
constraints.errorMessage: Essence cannot drop below 0.

types.name: Bandersnatch
types.notes: Infected sasquatch. Blind but uses echolocation.

types.name: Ghoul
types.notes: Most common infected type. Can affect any metatype.

types.name: Mutaqua
types.notes: Awakened infected troll. Retains magical ability.

types.name: Nosferatu
types.notes: Awakened infected human. Classic vampire archetype.

types.name: Vampire
types.notes: Infected human. The iconic HMHVV strain I creature.

essenceDrain.description: Drains Essence through touch or bite.

diseaseStrains.name: HMHVV Strain I
diseaseStrains.description: The original Human-Metahuman Vampiric Virus. Creates the most powerful infected types including vampires, banshees, and wendigos.

diseaseStrains.name: HMHVV Strain II
diseaseStrains.description: A weaker strain creating loup-garou, grendels, harvesters, and similar infected. Less powerful but still dangerous.

diseaseStrains.name: HMHVV Strain III
diseaseStrains.description: The weakest and most common strain, responsible for ghouls. Can infect any metatype.

nationality.name: UCAS
nationality.description: Born in the United Canadian and American States.

subModules.name: General UCAS
subModules.description: Born in the general UCAS territory.

subModules.name: Canada
subModules.description: Born in the Canadian sector of the UCAS.

subModules.name: Denver (UCAS Sector)
subModules.description: Born in the UCAS sector of Denver.

subModules.name: SINless
subModules.description: Born SINless in the UCAS. No national SIN, no corporate ties.

nationality.name: CAS
nationality.description: Born in the Confederation of American States.

subModules.name: General CAS
subModules.description: Born in the general CAS territory.

subModules.name: Denver
subModules.description: Born in the CAS sector of Denver.

nationality.name: NAN
nationality.description: Born in the Native American Nations.
nationality.notes: Primary language chosen from regional options. English may be selected as secondary with 1 rank.

subModules.name: Pueblo Corporate Council
subModules.description: Born in the Pueblo Corporate Council.

subModules.name: Trans-Polar Aleut Nation
subModules.description: Born in the Trans-Polar Aleut Nation.
subModules.notes: Exotic Melee Weapon specialization: Harpoon

subModules.name: Denver
subModules.description: Born in the NAN sector of Denver.

nationality.name: Tír Tairngire
nationality.description: Born in Tír Tairngire, the Land of Promise.

subModules.name: Elves/Humans
subModules.description: Born as an elf or human in Tír Tairngire.

subModules.name: Orks/Trolls/Dwarfs
subModules.description: Born as an ork, troll, or dwarf in Tír Tairngire.

formative.name: Farm Living
formative.description: Raised on a farm in rural territory.

formative.name: Fugitive
formative.description: Raised on the run, always looking over your shoulder.

formative.name: Isolated Rural Upbringing
formative.description: Raised in an isolated rural area, far from civilization.

formative.name: Military Brat
formative.description: Raised in a military family, moving from base to base.

formative.name: Orphan
formative.description: Raised without parents, bouncing through the foster system.

formative.name: Street Urchin
formative.description: Raised on the streets, fighting for survival from childhood.

formative.name: White Collar
formative.description: Raised in a comfortable white-collar household.

teen.name: Farm Living
teen.description: Spent teen years working on a farm.

teen.name: Gang Warfare
teen.description: Spent teen years running with a gang.

teen.name: Home Tutored
teen.description: Educated at home by private tutors.

teen.name: Isolated Rural Upbringing
teen.description: Spent teen years in an isolated rural area.

teen.name: Magical Education
teen.description: Attended a school for the magically gifted.
teen.notes: Choose a magical tradition path for additional skill groups.

subModules.name: Magician
subModules.notes: Add 1 rank to two of: Sorcery skill group, Conjuring skill group, Enchanting skill group.

subModules.name: Adept
subModules.notes: Add 1 rank to two of: Close Combat skill group, Firearms skill group, Stealth skill group.

subModules.name: Aspected Magician
subModules.notes: Add 1 rank to Sorcery, Conjuring, or Enchanting skill group; then add 2 ranks split among Arcana, Assensing, and Astral Combat.

subModules.name: Mystic Adept
subModules.notes: Add 1 rank to any two groups from the Magician or Adept lists.

teen.name: Military School
teen.description: Attended a military academy during teen years.

teen.name: Street Kid
teen.description: Spent teen years surviving on the streets.

subModules.name: Architecture
subModules.notes: Artisan has Drawing specialization.

subModules.name: Magic
subModules.notes: Choose Academic Knowledge: Magical Theory or Metaplanes.

subModules.name: Natural Sciences
subModules.notes: Choose one: Chemistry, Physics, or Biology for Academic Knowledge.

subModules.name: History
subModules.notes: Choose National or World History.

subModules.name: Literature
subModules.notes: Artisan has Writing specialization.

subModules.name: Metahumanities
subModules.notes: Spread 13 ranks among at least three Academic Knowledge skills from: Ancient Language, Philosophy, Religion. Minimum 3 ranks each.

subModules.name: Social Sciences
subModules.notes: Spread 13 ranks among at least three Academic Knowledge skills from: Sociology, Psychology, Archaeology, Criminology, Politics. Minimum 3 ranks each.

education.name: State University/College
education.description: Attended a state university or college.
education.notes: Universal skills (Computer +1, Perception +1, Etiquette +1, Academic Knowledge [Any] +4) apply in addition to discipline skills.

subModules.name: Architecture
subModules.notes: Artisan has Drawing specialization.

subModules.name: Magic
subModules.notes: Choose Academic Knowledge: Magical Theory or Metaplanes.

subModules.name: Literature
subModules.notes: Artisan has Writing specialization.

subModules.name: Metahumanities
subModules.notes: Divide 13 ranks among all three areas (Ancient Language, Philosophy, Religion), no one skill more than 7.

subModules.name: Social Sciences
subModules.notes: Divide 13 ranks among desired subjects, no one skill more than 6.

education.name: Ivy League University
education.description: Attended a prestigious Ivy League university.
education.notes: Universal skills (Computer +1, Etiquette +1, Perception +1, Academic Knowledge [Any] +4) apply in addition to discipline skills.

subModules.name: Magic
subModules.notes: Choose Academic Knowledge: Magical Theory or Metaplanes.

subModules.name: Natural Sciences
subModules.notes: Choose one: Chemistry, Physics, or Biology.

subModules.name: Literature
subModules.notes: Artisan has Writing specialization.

subModules.name: Metahumanities
subModules.notes: Divide 10 ranks among all three areas (Ancient Language, Philosophy, Religion), minimum 2 each.

subModules.name: Social Sciences
subModules.notes: Divide 10 ranks among at least three subjects, no single skill more than 6.

education.name: Military Academy
education.notes: Universal skills (Firearms group +1, First Aid +1, Leadership +1, Navigation +1, Swimming +1, Unarmed Combat +1, Academic Knowledge: Military History +2, Professional Knowledge: Military +3) apply in addition to discipline skills. Military Rank quality at 20 karma value.

subModules.name: Architecture
subModules.notes: Artisan has Drawing specialization.

subModules.name: Magic
subModules.notes: Choose Academic Knowledge: Magical Theory or Metaplanes.

subModules.name: Literature
subModules.notes: Artisan has Writing specialization.

subModules.name: Metahumanities
subModules.notes: Distribute 13 ranks with no more than 6 ranks each.

subModules.name: Social Sciences
subModules.notes: Distribute 13 ranks with no more than 6 in any given subject.

education.name: Trade/Technical School
education.description: Attended a trade or technical school.
education.notes: General Studies (Computers +1, Gymnastics +2, Perception +1) apply in addition to vocation skills.

subModules.name: Fashion Designer
subModules.notes: Artisan has Fashion specialization.

subModules.name: Graphic Designer
subModules.notes: Artisan has Drawing specialization.

career.name: Bounty Hunter
career.description: Worked as a bounty hunter, tracking down fugitives.

career.name: Celebrity
career.description: Lived as a celebrity in the public eye.
career.notes: Add +1 to two attributes of choice (other than Charisma). Also +6 ranks to buy skills appropriate to field (no more than 3 ranks per skill; Con and Escape Artist may be purchased further).

career.name: Combat Correspondent
career.description: Worked as a journalist embedded with combat units.

career.name: Covert Operations
career.description: Worked in covert operations and espionage.

career.name: Drifter
career.description: Spent years drifting from place to place.
career.notes: Add +1 to any two separate attributes.

career.name: Ganger
career.description: Ran with a gang as an adult.

career.name: Law Enforcement
career.notes: Basic Training (Clubs +1, Etiquette +1, First Aid +1, Leadership +1, Perception +1, Pistols +1, Professional Knowledge: Police Procedures +3) applies to all branches.

career.name: Political Activist
career.description: Spent years as a political activist.

career.name: Postgraduate Studies
career.notes: Also add +10 ranks to skills from your education module (no more than 4 added to any one skill).

career.name: Private Investigator/Detective
career.description: Worked as a private investigator or detective.
career.notes: Must have completed Tour of Duty, Law Enforcement, Covert Operations, Shadow Work, or Corporate module.

career.name: Regular Job
career.notes: Also add +6 points to vocational skills relating to your job (no more than 3 ranks per skill).

career.name: Shadow Work
career.description: Worked the shadows as a shadowrunner.

subModules.name: Smuggler
subModules.notes: Choose one Mechanic skill: Aeronautics, Automotive, or Nautical.

subModules.name: Aspected Magician
subModules.notes: Add +1 to the Alchemy, Conjuring, or Spellcasting skill group.

career.name: Think Tank
career.description: Worked in a think tank, conducting research and analysis.
career.notes: Three different Academic Knowledge skills must be selected.

tour.name: Mercenary
tour.notes: Must have completed another Tour of Duty, the Company Man (Corporate), or Shadow Work module.

tour.name: NAN Military
tour.description: Served in the Native American Nations military.
tour.notes: Basic Training (Firearms group +1, First Aid +1, Navigation +1, Unarmed Combat +1, Professional Knowledge: NAN Military +3) applies to all branches.

tour.name: Tír Tairngire Military
tour.description: Served in the Tír Tairngire military.
tour.notes: Basic Training (Firearms group +1, First Aid +1, Navigation +1, Unarmed Combat +1, Professional Knowledge: Peacekeepers +4) applies to all branches.

tour.name: UCAS/CAS/CFS Military
tour.description: Served in the UCAS, CAS, or CFS military.
tour.notes: Basic Training (Firearms group +1, First Aid +1, Navigation +1, Unarmed Combat +1, Professional Knowledge: Military +4) applies to all branches.

subModules.name: Medical Corps
subModules.notes: Must have finished Nurse or Medicine module from Further Education.
